title: Jamesonia novogranatensis
taxonomy: Jamesonia novogranatensis is a species of fern within the genus Jamesonia. It belongs to the family Pteridaceae. The genus Jamesonia is a part of the class Polypodiopsida, which includes most modern ferns. The class Polypodiopsida is further divided into the division Pteridophyta, which encompasses all vascular plants that produce spores. This classification reflects Jamesonia novogranatensis's unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a vascular plant.
